expected_decision_range: Phased emergency package now; defer final reservoir approval
Emergency measures now; defer reservoir approval
Defer pending climate, safety, and land-acquisition review
suspicious_decisions: Build as proposed without phased sequencing
Do not build without interim protective measures

final_recommendation.multi_agent: Phased emergency package now; defer final reservoir approval
final_recommendation.single_agent: Emergency measures now; defer final reservoir approval

key_deliberative_contributions: Separation of immediate emergency protective package from final reservoir approval — prevents false binary between 'approve everything now' and 'defer everything'; produced via Dam Safety + Legal + Social agents' sequential framing

Downstream risk transfer identified as a distinct must-detect blocker — fast reservoir releases could concentrate peak flood flows downstream if operations fail; produced via Dam Safety required challenge (F2.6, F8.4)
Low-income downstream neighborhood equity gap identified — reservoir-only protection leaves exposed neighborhoods without levee repair; produced via Social agent required challenge (F5.5, F2.5)

3-year emergency schedule quality-control risk flagged as must-detect — compressed timeline historically associated with construction defects; produced via Engineering required challenge on schedule adequacy (F3.5)
